summary: BIQc Platform Comprehensive Audit - Iteration 66. All public pages render with Liquid Steel dark theme (#0F1720). Navigation works (Platform, Intelligence, Integrations, Pricing, Trust dropdown with 5 sub-pages). Footer has 12 links working. Login/Register pages functional with OAuth buttons. Mobile responsive at 390px verified. NO animate-spin spinners on auth/loading screens. Protected routes (17/17) properly redirect to login. Supabase auth returns 400 in preview environment - unable to test authenticated pages. Code review confirms admin skip/back buttons, calibration logic, and sidebar structure correctly implemented.

integration_issues.issue: Login returns 400 error - credentials don't work in preview environment

Orange accent color (#FF6A00) on CTAs and stats

Trust dropdown with 5 sub-pages (Terms, Privacy, DPA, Security, Trust Centre)

Super Admin and Recalibrate options in user menu (code verified)
Sidebar has 20 items across 4 sections (code verified)

Unable to test authenticated pages due to Supabase auth 400 error in preview environment
Consider testing authenticated flows in production environment with valid credentials

5 pages use DEMO data: ActionsPage, AutomationsPageAuth, CompliancePage, ReportsPage, AuditLogPage (as documented)
animate-spin is used in some dashboard pages (Integrations, EmailInbox) for loading states but NOT on auth/login screens
